headline: About me
paragraphs: I'm a full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building production web applications. I care deeply about developer experience, performance, and accessibility.

I started as a backend engineer working with Node.js and PostgreSQL, then fell in love with the React ecosystem. Today I work across the full stack — from REST and GraphQL APIs to polished, animated UIs.
Outside of code I enjoy hiking in Patagonia, specialty coffee, and mentoring junior developers in the local community.
